key_facts: Representative of China's S2B2C solar marketplace model that emerged 2016–2018
S2B2C model: platforms aggregate solar component supply chains + provide installers (B) with tools to sell to consumers (C)
Offered 'one-stop display, sales, and after-sales' with online consultation
Multiple such platforms emerged in the 2016–2018 wave; this specific entity has very low confidence
No verifiable data found for '光伏行家 (PV Expert Shanghai) Tech Co., Ltd.'
The S2B2C model as a category was widely described in Chinese trade press 2016–2018
business_model_notes: S2B2C (Supplier-to-Business-to-Consumer) solar marketplace: aggregates panel/inverter/mounting suppliers at the 'S' layer; provides digital tools to installers at the 'B' layer (quote generation, design tools, order management); enables installers to present professional purchasing experience to homeowners at the 'C' layer. This model was popularized in China solar around 2016–2018 as installer digitalization became a category. The specific company (光伏行家) is one of many anonymous entrants in this wave with low public profile.
structural_finding: The S2B2C model for solar installers in China was a structural innovation of 2016–2018, enabling the fragmented installer base (10,000+ small EPC firms) to professionalize. However, no dominant single platform emerged — instead, general B2B procurement tools (JD Industrial, Alibaba 1688) and segment-specific tools (Zheguyun) captured portions of this market. The S2B2C solar-specific wave largely failed to produce a standalone winner.
research_notes: Lowest confidence (★1). Agent search found zero verifiable data for this specific entity. The S2B2C solar model as a category is well-documented but this particular company (光伏行家) does not appear in accessible Chinese corporate databases or media. Recommend: remove from company list or re-categorize as 'structural model example' rather than specific company entry.
